classitems.description:

classitems.description:
Safe escape URL Variable (using RFC3986 standards to be full Unicode compliant).
This is a shortcut to the encodeURIComponent() to provide a standard into Smart.Framework/JS.

params.name: str
params.description: The URL variable value to be escaped

classitems.description:
Convert special characters to HTML entities.
This is like the Smart::escape_html() from the PHP Smart.Framework.
These values will be converted to safe HTML entities: < > & "
classitems.name: escape_html

params.name: str
params.description: The string to be escaped

return.description: The safe escaped string to be injected in HTML code

classitems.description:
Convert special characters to escaped entities for safe use with Javascript Strings.
This is like the Smart::escape_js() from the PHP Smart.Framework.
classitems.name: escape_js

params.name: str
params.description: The string to be escaped

return.description: The escaped string using the json encode standard to be injected between single quotes '' or double quotes ""

classitems.description:
Render Simple Marker Template (only marker replacements, no IF or LOOP syntax, not even marker escaping syntax)
This is compatible just with the SIMPLE REPLACEMENT of Smart.Framework PHP server-side Markers Templating for substitutions on client-side, except it can only process marker substitutions without extended syntax as IF/LOOP/INCLUDE.
Notice: It ONLY supports the marker syntax like [####MARKER####]
To be used together with the server-side marker templating to avoid the server-side markers to be replaced as (####+/-MARKER+/-####) need the: template to be escape_url+escape_js and 3rd param: urlescaped = TRUE
classitems.name: render_markers_template

params.name: template
params.description: The string template with markers

params.name: arrobj
params.description: The Object-Array with marker replacements as { 'MAR.KER_1' => 'Value 1', 'MARKER-2' => 'Value 2', ... }

classitems.description: Redirect to URL current browser window
classitems.name: RedirectToURL

params.name: yURL
params.description: The URL (relative or absolute) to redirect to ; if = @ (will just autorefresh the page)

params.name: yURL
params.description: The URL (relative or absolute) to redirect to

params.description: The time delay in milliseconds

classitems.description: Redirect to URL parent browser window
classitems.name: RedirectParent

params.name: yURL
params.description: The URL (relative or absolute) to redirect to

classitems.description:
Lazy Refresh parent browser window or Lazy redirect parent window to another URL.
This method is different than RedirectParent() because will be executed just after the child (modal iFrame / PopUp) is closed.
It will just trigger a lazy refresh on parent that will be executed later, after closing current child window.
classitems.name: RefreshParent

params.name: yURL
params.description: *Optional* The URL (relative or absolute) to redirect to ; if this parameter is not specified will just reload the parent window with the same URL

classitems.description:
Close a Modal / PopUp child browser window.
If a parent refresh is pending will execute it after.
This is the prefered way to close a child window (modal iFrame / PopUp) using a button or just executing this code in a child page.
classitems.name: CloseModalPopUp

classitems.description:
Delayed Close a Modal / PopUp child browser window.
If a parent refresh is pending will execute it after.
This is the prefered way to close a child window (modal iFrame / PopUp) using a button or just executing this code in a child page.
classitems.name: CloseDelayedModalPopUp

params.name: timeout
params.description: The time delay in milliseconds ; If is NULL or 0 (zero) will use the default timeout

classitems.description: Focus a browser window by reference
classitems.name: windowFocus

params.name: wnd
params.description: The window (reference) object

classitems.description:
Scroll down a browser window by reference.
It will focus the referenced browser window first.
classitems.name: windwScrollDown

params.name: wnd
params.description: The window (reference) object

params.name: offset
params.description: The offset in pixels to scroll down

classitems.description:
Get the highest available Z-Index from a browser page taking in account all visible layers (div).
It will ignore non-visible layers for speed-up, as they have anyway no Z-Index assigned.
classitems.name: getHighestZIndex

return.description: The highest available Z-Index from current page

classitems.description:
Display a page overlay in the current browser window
The ZIndex of the overlay is: 2147400000
All page elements that must be visible over this overlay must have zIndex in range: 2147401000 - 214740999
classitems.name: Overlay_Show

params.name: text
params.description: *Optional* a text to display in overlay as notification

params.name: title
params.description: *Optional* a title to display for overlay as notification

params.name: class_name
params.description: *Optional* a CSS class name for the notification (if any)

classitems.description: Clear all notifications from the page overlay in the current browser window
classitems.name: Overlay_Clear

classitems.description: Hide (destroy) the page overlay in the current browser window
classitems.name: Overlay_Hide

classitems.description: Add a Growl notification in the current browser window (page)
classitems.name: GrowlNotificationAdd

params.name: title
params.description: a title for the notification (HTML) ; it can be empty string

params.name: text
params.description: the main notification message (HTML) ; this is mandatory

params.name: image
params.description: the URL link to a notification icon image (gif/png/jpg) or null

params.name: time
params.description: the notification display time in milliseconds

params.name: sticky
params.description: *Optional* FALSE by default (will auto-close after the display time expire) ; TRUE to set sticky (require manual close, will not auto-close)

params.name: class_name
params.description: *Optional* a CSS class name for the notification or empty string to use default one

params.name: options
params.description: *Optional* can map handlers for notification: before_open, after_open, before_close, after_close

return.description: The growl notification as HTML object

classitems.description: Remove a Growl Notification by ID from the current browser window (page)
classitems.name: GrowlNotificationRemove

params.name: id
params.description: The HTML id of the Growl Notification to remove

classitems.description:
Create a Maximize HTML Element wrapper arround a layer (div, iframe, ...).
This will add a maximize / un-maximize button and the handler to be able to maximize the element.
When the selected element will be maximized the page will be protected by an overlay.
classitems.name: MaximizeElement

params.name: id
params.description: The HTML id of the HTML element to bind to

params.name: maximized
params.description: if (default) FALSE the element will not be maximized when bind to this ; if TRUE, element will be auto-maximized when bind to this function

classitems.description:
Create a Browser Alert Dialog that will have just the OK button.
This will detect if the UIDialog is available and will prefer to use it if set.
Otherwise will try to detect if SimpleDislog is available and will use it if UIDialog is not available - fallback.
If none of the above are available (not available) will display a simple alert() - fallback.
classitems.name: alert_Dialog

params.name: y_message
params.description: The message to display (HTML)

params.name: evcode
params.description: *Optional* the JS Code to execute on closing this alert / Dialog by pressing the OK button (the alert / Dialog can be closed only if OK button is clicked)

params.name: y_title
params.description: *Optional* a title for this alert / Dialog (HTML)

params.name: y_width
params.description: *Optional* the width of the Dialog (will be used just if UIDialog / SimpleDialog are detected) ; if not set the default width will be used

params.name: y_height
params.description: *Optional* the height of the Dialog (will be used just if UIDialog / SimpleDialog are detected) ; if not set the default height will be used

classitems.description:
Create a Browser Confirm Dialog that will have 2 buttons: OK / Cancel.
This will detect if the UIDialog is available and will prefer to use it if set.
Otherwise will try to detect if SimpleDislog is available and will use it if UIDialog is not available - fallback.
If none of the above are available (not available) will display a simple confirm() - fallback.
classitems.name: confirm_Dialog

params.name: y_question
params.description: The question / message to display (HTML)

params.name: evcode
params.description: *Optional* the JS Code to execute on closing this confirm / Dialog by pressing the OK button (the confirm / Dialog can be closed by either OK button clicked or Cancel button clicked ; this code will be not executed on Cancel button click / close)

params.name: y_title
params.description: *Optional* a title for this confirm / Dialog (HTML)

params.name: y_width
params.description: *Optional* the width of the Dialog (will be used just if UIDialog / SimpleDialog are detected) ; if not set the default width will be used

params.name: y_height
params.description: *Optional* the height of the Dialog (will be used just if UIDialog / SimpleDialog are detected) ; if not set the default height will be used

classitems.description:
Confirm a Form Submit by a confirm / Dialog, with OK and Cancel buttons.
The form will be submitted just if OK button is clicked.
This function is using confirm_Dialog() and will detect and prefer in this order if UIDialog / SimpleDialog or just confirm() are available in Browser.
classitems.name: confirmSubmitForm

params.name: y_confirm
params.description: The question / message to display for confirmation (HTML)

params.name: y_form
params.description: The HTML Form Object to bind to

params.name: y_target
params.description: The window target to send this form to

params.name: windowWidth
params.description: *Optional* the width of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default width will be used

params.name: windowHeight
params.description: *Optional* the height of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default height will be used

params.name: forcePopUp
params.description: *Optional* if a new target window is required, 0 = default, use modal/iFrame if set by SmartJS_BrowserUtils_Use_iFModalBox_Active, 1 = force PopUp ; -1 force modal/iFrame

params.name: forceDims
params.description: *Optional* if set to 1 will try force uwing the width/height set for the new modal/iFrame or PopUp

classitems.description:
Raise a Modal/iFrame or PopUp child window with a new target to post a form within.
It will get the form URL and form method GET/POST directly from the objForm.
This function must be called by a form button onClick followed by 'return false;' not by classic submit to avoid fire the form send twice 1st before (in a _blank window) and 2nd after opening the child popup/modal.
This function if used in a button with 'return false;' will catch the form send behaviour and will trigger it just after the child modal/iFrame or PopUp child window (new) target is opened and available.
classitems.name: PopUpSendForm

params.name: objForm
params.description: The HTML Form Object reference

params.name: strTarget
params.description: The child window target to post this form to

params.name: windowWidth
params.description: *Optional* the width of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default width will be used

params.name: windowHeight
params.description: *Optional* the height of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default height will be used

params.name: forcePopUp
params.description: *Optional* if a new target window is required, 0 = default, use modal/iFrame if set by SmartJS_BrowserUtils_Use_iFModalBox_Active, 1 = force PopUp ; -1 force modal/iFrame

params.name: forceDims
params.description: *Optional* if set to 1 will try force uwing the width/height set for the new modal/iFrame or PopUp

params.name: evcode
params.description: *Optional* the JS Code to execute after submit this form

classitems.description:
Raise a Modal/iFrame or PopUp child window with a new target to open a URL link within.
This function can be called by a button, a link or other HTML elements at onClick (if 'a' element onClick is used must be followed by 'return false;' to avoid fire page refresh.
classitems.name: PopUpLink

params.name: strUrl
params.description: The URL link to be opened in a new browser child window target

params.name: strTarget
params.description: The child window target to post this form to

params.name: windowWidth
params.description: *Optional* the width of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default width will be used

params.name: windowHeight
params.description: *Optional* the height of the new Modal/PopUp child window if new window target is used ; if not set the default height will be used

params.name: forcePopUp
params.description: *Optional* if a new target window is required, 0 = default, use modal/iFrame if set by SmartJS_BrowserUtils_Use_iFModalBox_Active, 1 = force PopUp ; -1 force modal/iFrame

params.name: forceDims
params.description: *Optional* if set to 1 will try force uwing the width/height set for the new modal/iFrame or PopUp

classitems.description:
Submit a Form by Ajax via POST and Handle the Answer
It supports simple forms or complex forms with multipart/form-data and file attachments.
This function expects a json answer with the following structure: see more in framework PHP lib SmartComponents::js_ajax_replyto_html_form()
		{ // Json Structure for Answer
			'completed': 	'DONE',
			'status': 		'OK|ERROR',
			'action': 		'Notification Button Text: Ok/Cancel',
			'title': 		'Notification Title',
			'message': 		'Notification Message HTML Content',
			'js_evcode': 	'If non-empty, the JS Code to execute on either SUCCESS or ERROR (before redirect or Div Replace)'
			'redirect': 	'If non-empty, a redirect URL on either SUCCESS or ERROR ; on SUCCESS if message is Empty will redirect without confirmation: Growl / Dialog',
			'replace_div': 	'If non-empty, an ID for a div to be replaced with content from [replace_html] on Success',
			'replace_html': 'If non-empty, a HTML code to populate / replace the current Content for the [replace_div] on Success'
		} // #END Json Structure
classitems.name: Submit_Form_By_Ajax

params.name: the_form_id
params.description: The form ID

params.name: url
params.description: The form destination URL

params.name: growl
params.description: *Optional* If 'yes' will use the Growl notifications otherwise (default: if 'no') will use Dialog notifications

params.name: evcode
params.description: *Optional* the JS Code to execute on SUCCESS answer (before anything else)

params.name: everrcode
params.description: *Optional* the JS Code to execute on ERROR answer (before anything else)

classitems.description:
Create an Ajax XHR Request (POST) by Form
It supports simple forms or complex forms with multipart/form-data and file attachments.
classitems.name: Ajax_XHR_GetByForm

params.name: the_form_id
params.description: The element ID of the form to be create the Ajax XHR Request for

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to send form to via POST

params.name: data_type
params.description: The type of Data served back by the Request: json | html | text

classitems.description:
Create a general purpose Ajax XHR Request (GET/POST) with Optional support for Authentication and Extra Headers
It is NOT intended to be used with HTML forms that may contain multipart/form-data and file attachments or not.
For creating an Ajax XHR Request to be used with HTML Forms use:
		SmartJS_BrowserUtils.Ajax_XHR_GetByForm(); 		// basic, will detect the form type if must use multipart/form-data + attachments (if any)
or even much better use this:
		SmartJS_BrowserUtils.Submit_Form_By_Ajax(); 	// advanced, will handle the XHR form request and the answer
classitems.name: Ajax_XHR_Request_From_URL

params.name: y_url
params.description: The URL to send the Request to

params.name: y_method
params.description: The Request Method: GET / POST

params.name: y_data_type
params.description: The type of Data served back by the Request: json | html | text

params.name: y_data_arr_or_serialized
params.description: The Data to be sent: a serialized string via serialize() such as: '&var1=value1&var2=value2' or an associative array as: { var1: "value1", var2: "value2" }

params.name: y_AuthUser
params.description: *Optional* The Authentication UserName (if custom Authentication need to be used)

params.name: y_AuthPass
params.description: *Optional* The Authentication Password (if custom Authentication need to be used)

params.name: y_Headers
params.description: *Optional* Extra Headers to be sent with this Request

classitems.description:
Loads the contents for a Div (or other compatible) HTML Element(s) by Ajax using a GET / POST Ajax Request
This is intended to simplify populating a Div (or other compatible) HTML Element(s) with content(s) by Ajax Requests.

params.description: The ID of the Div (or other compatible) HTML Element(s) to bind to

params.name: y_img_loader
params.description: If non-empty, a pre-loader image that will be displayed while loading ...

params.name: y_url
params.description: The URL to send the Request to

params.name: y_method
params.description: The Request Method: GET / POST

params.name: y_data_type
params.description: The type of Data served back by the Request: html | text

params.name: y_data_arr_or_serialized
params.description: The Data to be sent: a serialized string via serialize() such as: '&var1=value1&var2=value2' or an associative array as: { var1: "value1", var2: "value2" }
